title: Iresine latifolia
taxonomy: Iresine latifolia belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Iresine. The plant is native to South America and is a member of the Amaranth order (Caryophyllales). Its classification is further detailed as follows: Iresine latifolia is a type of flowering plant that is a member of the family Amaranthaceae, and is classified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Caryophyllales. The specific classification of Iresine latifolia is a subject of ongoing scientific research and may be updated as new information becomes available.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress.
